query: My webhook should return a custom JSON body after the workflow finishes, not the default 200. How?
expected_behavior: Sets the Webhook node responseMode to 'responseNode' (Using Respond to Webhook node)
Adds a Respond to Webhook node at the end returning the custom JSON
Notes the alternative 'lastNode' mode and when 'onReceived' is wrong here
Reminds that webhook body is read via $json.body
